name: OPQ32r
description: The OPQ32r (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) is a personality assessment that measures 32 dimensions of personality relevant to workplace performance. It predicts behavior in key areas like leading and deciding, supporting and cooperating, interacting and presenting, analyzing and interpreting, creating and conceptualizing, organizing and executing, and adapting and coping.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Identifies what motivates and engages candidates in the workplace. Explores 18 dimensions of motivation and energy to help predict employee engagement and retention.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures numerical reasoning ability by presenting data in tables and graphs that candidates must interpret to answer questions. Assesses ability to work with numbers, interpret statistics, and draw accurate conclusions.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures verbal reasoning ability. Candidates read passages and decide whether statements are true, false, or cannot be determined. Assesses reading comprehension and logical reasoning from text.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures inductive reasoning by asking candidates to identify rules in sequences of shapes and figures. Assesses abstract thinking and pattern recognition.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures deductive reasoning ability by presenting logical statements from which candidates draw conclusions. Tests analytical thinking and structured logic.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Mobile-first adaptive numerical reasoning test. Interactive format with data interpretation tasks optimized for all devices.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Mobile-first adaptive verbal reasoning test in an interactive format. Measures reading comprehension and verbal reasoning.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Mobile-first adaptive deductive reasoning test in an interactive engaging format.

name: Verify G+ (General Cognitive Ability)
description: Adaptive general cognitive ability test measuring verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning in a short format. Ideal for screening large candidate pools quickly.

name: General Ability Test (GAT)
description: Measures overall cognitive ability across verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning. Suitable for high-volume hiring at entry to mid-level.

name: Numerical Ability Test (Entry Level)
description: Basic numerical ability assessment for entry-level and clerical roles. Tests arithmetic, percentages, ratios, and basic data interpretation.

name: Verbal Ability Test (Entry Level)
description: Basic verbal ability test for entry-level roles, assessing vocabulary, word relationships, and basic reading comprehension.

name: Diagrammatic Reasoning
description: Measures ability to follow complex diagrams and logical rules. Relevant for IT, systems analysis, and engineering roles requiring process-oriented thinking.

name: Mechanical Comprehension Test (MCT2)
description: Measures understanding of mechanical and physical principles including forces, gears, levers, and fluid mechanics. Appropriate for technical and engineering roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning Test
description: Measures ability to visualize and manipulate objects in two and three dimensions. Relevant for engineering, design, and technical roles.

name: Calculation Test
description: Measures speed and accuracy in basic calculations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and percentages. Suited for clerical and banking roles.

name: General Reasoning Battery (GRB)
description: Battery of reasoning tests covering verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning. Used for graduate and professional hiring across multiple industries.

name: Financial Professional (FP) Numerical Reasoning
description: Advanced numerical reasoning test for financial services professionals. Tests financial data interpretation, ratio analysis, and complex numerical problem solving.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice knowledge test covering Java 8 concepts including lambda expressions, streams, functional interfaces, date-time API, and core OOP principles.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering multithreading, collections, generics, JVM internals, design patterns, and advanced OOP concepts.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring Python programming knowledge including syntax, data structures, OOP, file handling, and standard library usage.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation, joins, aggregation, and transaction processing.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Measures JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, closures, prototypal inheritance, and modern JS practices.

name: React (New)
description: Measures knowledge of React framework, including components, hooks, state management, lifecycle methods, and modern React patterns.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container, Spring Boot, and transactions.

name: .NET (New)
description: Measures knowledge of .NET framework including C#, ASP.NET, CLR, LINQ, and .NET core concepts.

name: C++ (New)
description: Measures C++ programming knowledge including memory management, templates, STL, OOP principles, and modern C++ features.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases, and generation of test reports.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: A coding simulation where candidates debug and fix broken code. Assesses practical coding ability across multiple languages in a real IDE environment.

name: Automata - Pro (Coding Simulation)
description: Advanced coding simulation for experienced developers. Tests practical programming ability through real coding tasks in an IDE environment.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring ability to use MS Excel to maintain, organize, analyze, and present numeric data. Covers formulas, functions, pivot tables, and charts.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Measures ability to create, format, and manage documents in Microsoft Word, including formatting, mail merge, and document organization.

name: Data Entry Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures typing speed and accuracy for data entry tasks. Used for administrative, clerical, and back-office roles.

name: Workplace English Language Test (WELT)
description: Assesses English language proficiency in workplace contexts including listening, reading, and language use. Suitable for BPO, customer service, and global roles.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire 32 (OPQ32)
description: Full 32-scale personality questionnaire measuring work-relevant behavioral preferences across relationships, thinking styles, and feelings and emotions. The global standard in personality assessment.

name: Global Scales Assessment (GSA)
description: A shorter personality assessment based on OPQ scales, measuring key personality dimensions relevant to workplace performance. Good for volume hiring.

name: ADEPT-15 Personality Assessment
description: Measures 15 personality dimensions with strong predictive validity for workplace performance. Based on a model aligned with the Big Five frameworks.

name: Sales Achievement Predictor
description: Personality-based assessment predicting success in sales roles. Measures traits aligned with high sales performance such as resilience, drive, persuasiveness, and customer focus.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Personality assessment measuring traits relevant to customer-facing roles. Assesses service orientation, empathy, communication style, and resilience.

name: Personnel Reaction Blank (PRB)
description: Measures integrity and dependability related to counterproductive work behaviors. Predicts reliability, honesty, and absence of misconduct.

name: Personality-Based Emotional Intelligence
description: Measures emotional intelligence dimensions including self-awareness, empathy, emotional regulation, and social skills relevant to leadership and collaborative roles.

name: Situational Judgment Test for Customer Service
description: Scenario-based assessment measuring judgment in customer service situations. Candidates select the best response to realistic customer service scenarios.

name: SHL Agile Simulation
description: Work simulation measuring ability to apply agile principles in realistic project scenarios. Tests backlog management, sprint planning, and cross-functional collaboration.

name: Workplace Safety - Individual 7.1 (Americas)
description: Measures behaviors and experiences underlying safe workplace performance for entry-level positions in manufacturing, industrial, and operational environments.

name: Numerical Reasoning (SHL Manager Level)
description: Measures numerical reasoning ability appropriate for managerial roles. Involves interpreting complex data, financial reports, and charts.

name: Verbal Reasoning (SHL Manager Level)
description: Measures verbal reasoning ability appropriate for managerial roles, including comprehension of complex written materials and logical conclusions.

name: Graduate MR1 - Checking
description: Measures ability to check data quickly and accurately. Suitable for clerical and administrative roles requiring attention to detail.

name: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
description: Tests knowledge of SEO principles, keyword research, on-page and off-page optimization, technical SEO, and analytics.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: Report derived from OPQ32 scores mapping personality to the Universal Competency Framework (UCF). Provides competency-based interpretation for selection and development.
